title: Stereo Letta
description: Tote bag customization at the Stereo Letta event in Saint Petersburg, Sevkabel Port. Live bag painting for event guests.

details.task: Organize a custom zone with tote bag painting at the Stereo Letta event in Sevkabel Port.
details.solution: Set up a workshop at the event venue. Artists painted tote bags for guests in real time with unique designs.
details.result: Over 200 custom tote bags in a single day. The custom zone became one of the event's most popular activations.
